world_type: Contemporary drama with dark comedy undertones
tone: Dry, deadpan, emotionally honest. Humor comes from character contradictions, not situations.
rules: No superpowers. No genre conventions. Only human behavior.
Characters never say exactly what they mean.
Silence is a valid panel. Use it.
visual_style: Graphic novel realism with expressive linework. Muted palette punctuated by color accents on emotional beats.
